navigation.howItWorksDescription: Discover how to transform your way of creating, managing and grading exams
navigation.examsDescription: Create and manage exams in multiple ways
navigation.aiGeneratorDescription: Generate exams automatically with artificial intelligence
navigation.paperExamsDescription: Scan and grade physical exams automatically

footer.description: ProfeVision is the comprehensive platform for educators. Automates exam creation and grading with AI and OMR technology, allowing you to scan and correct paper tests instantly with your mobile. Additionally, it centralizes complete management of institutions, subjects, groups, and students. Save time, optimize educational evaluation, and get precise insights for more effective teaching. It's your definitive tool to transform academic management.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.description: Discover how ProfeVision simplifies exam creation, grading, and management in just a few steps
howItWorks.stepsTitle: 4 Simple Steps to Transform Your Teaching
howItWorks.stepsDescription: Follow our intuitive process to create, apply, and grade exams efficiently

step1.title: Create Your Exams
step1.description: Use our AI-powered tools to generate questions or create them manually. Choose from multiple formats and customize according to your needs.

step2.title: Apply to Students
step2.description: Print personalized formats for each student with unique QR codes. Assign digital exams or distribute physical answer sheets.

step3.title: Scan and Grade
step3.description: Use your smartphone to scan answer sheets. Our OMR technology automatically processes responses and calculates grades instantly.

step4.title: Analyze Results
step4.description: Access detailed reports on student performance, identify improvement areas, and make data-driven educational decisions.

howItWorks.ctaDescription: Join thousands of educators who are already saving time and improving their students' results.

homepage.heroTitle: The Best App for Scanning and Grading Paper Exams
homepage.heroDescription: At ProfeVision, we understand the challenges of modern education. We've developed an all-in-one solution that automates exam creation, grading, and management with AI, freeing up your valuable time to focus on what really matters: teaching and empowering your students' learning.
homepage.featuresTitle: Everything you need in one platform
homepage.featuresDescription: ProfeVision simplifies your work as an educator with powerful and intuitive tools
homepage.modulesDescription: Organize all aspects of your educational environment in one place
homepage.benefitsTitle: Save time and improve educational quality
homepage.benefitsDescription: ProfeVision allows you to focus on what really matters: teaching and your students' learning, driving digital transformation in education. We are the platform for teachers you were looking for.
homepage.ctaTitle: Transform your educational experience with ProfeVision
homepage.ctaDescription: Join thousands of educators who are already optimizing their work and improving their students' results.

examCreation.title: Intelligent Exam Creation
examCreation.description: Generate personalized educational tests with AI assistance. Enjoy multiple formats (multiple choice, true/false, etc.), quality questions and reusable templates. Save time and ensure accurate and relevant assessments.

aiGrading.title: AI and Computer Vision Grading (OMR)
aiGrading.description: Transform your grading process. Our evaluation platform allows you to grade exams with your phone in minutes with our advanced OMR technology. Simply scan and process answer sheets automatically with your smartphone or tablet. AI handles instant correction of online tests and accurate paper reading.

analytics.title: Detailed Results Analysis
analytics.description: Get valuable insights into your students' performance. Identify areas for improvement, strengths and trends with our graphic and detailed reports. Make informed pedagogical decisions to enhance adaptive learning.

subjects.title: Subject Management
items: Create and organize subjects by institution

automation.title: Intelligent Automation
automation.description: Drastically reduce time spent on administrative and grading tasks thanks to AI and our exam scanning application.

organization.title: Centralized Organization
organization.description: Have all educational information in one place, accessible when you need it, improving academic assessment management.

insights.title: Valuable Insights
insights.description: Make pedagogical decisions based on reliable data to improve student performance and adapt your strategies.

flexibility.title: Total Flexibility
flexibility.description: Adapt this exam platform to your specific needs and workflow, from elementary to university.

speed.title: Grading in Minutes, Not Hours
speed.description: OMR (Optical Mark Recognition) technology converts hours of manual grading into minutes, allowing you to focus on teaching and automated feedback. ProfeVision is one of the best digital tools for teachers.

howItWorks.title: Create and grade exams in seconds with ProfeVision
howItWorks.subtitle: The fastest and most modern way to evaluate your students
howItWorks.description: Would you like to create exams in minutes and grade them in seconds? With ProfeVision you can do it. Our platform is designed for teachers and schools looking to save time and get accurate results. Create exams with artificial intelligence, upload your tests in PDF and automatically grade by scanning printed answer sheets with your phone. Plus, organize everything by institutions, subjects and classes, and access a dashboard with detailed results metrics.
howItWorks.stepsDescription: Follow these simple steps to start using ProfeVision

step1.title: Create your exam
step1.description: Use our AI to generate questions automatically or upload your own PDF content

step2.title: Print the sheets
step2.description: Generate and print answer sheets with unique QR codes for each student

step3.title: Scan with your mobile
step3.description: Use the mobile app to scan completed sheets and get instant results

step4.title: Review results
step4.description: Access detailed analytics, export grades and manage student performance
